subcodes.first_line: O nightingale of the garden of divine truths and meanings! In very truth thou art afflicted and beset by manifold trials and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیب حدیقه حقائق و معانی فی الحقیقه بانواع بلایا و مصائب معذب و مبتلائی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God as sun, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
